runs.context_blueprint: {"language": "JavaScript", "build_system": "pnpm", "package_manager": "pnpm", "build_commands": ["pnpm install --frozen-lockfile", "pnpm --filter styled-components build"], "install_commands": [], "runtime_requirements": {"language_version": "14.x", "system_packages": []}, "repo_type": "monorepo", "base_image": "node:slim", "base_image_rationale": "Official Node.js slim image suitable for building a pnpm-based monorepo; aligns with engine>=14 requirement.", "pitfalls": ["pnpm install --frozen-lockfile must be compatible with pnpm v10 installed in container.", "node:slim image may not include git/build tools; if builds require native addons, install build tools.", "monorepo workspace may rely on file system structure; ensure COPY preserves package.json and pnpm-lock.yaml and workspace layout."], "notes": "This blueprint targets building the styled-components package in a pnpm workspace; outputs to packages/styled-components; also postbuild step copies README; the release scripts depend on Changesets; CI tokens in GitHub secrets are not available in Docker image by default; ensure environment variables are provided if replicating CI steps."}
runs.final_dockerfile:
# syntax=docker/dockerfile:1

FROM node:18-slim AS builder

# Install system dependencies (git for any VCS deps, build tools for native addons)
RUN apt-get update \
  && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends \
    git \
    build-essential \
    python3 \
  && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

# Install pnpm (v10 per repo's lockfile / blueprint)
RUN npm i -g pnpm@10.0.0

WORKDIR /workspace

# Copy source code
COPY . .

# Install dependencies (respect lockfile) and build the styled-components package
RUN pnpm install --frozen-lockfile
RUN pnpm --filter styled-components build
RUN pnpm --filter styled-components postbuild


FROM node:18-slim AS runtime

# Create a non-root user for runtime
RUN groupadd -r app && useradd -m -r -u 1001 -g app app

WORKDIR /workspace

# Copy the built package from the builder stage
COPY --from=builder /workspace/packages/styled-components /workspace/packages/styled-components

# Ensure correct ownership for non-root user
RUN chown -R app:app /workspace/packages/styled-components

USER app

# Simple entrypoint to verify container works and where artifacts live
# Avoid complex quoting issues in CMD by using a simple echo command
CMD ["bash", "-lc", "echo 'styled-components build is ready. artifacts located at /workspace/packages/styled-components'"]

steps.tool_input:
{"path": "Dockerfile", "content": "# Build container for styled-components project using pnpm workspace
FROM node:slim

# Install required system tools for building native addons and git access
ENV DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive
RUN apt-get update \
  && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends \
    git \
    ca-certificates \
    build-essential \
    python3 \
  && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

# Install a compatible version of pnpm (v10 as per blueprint)
RUN npm i -g pnpm@10

WORKDIR /workspace

# Copy manifest files first to leverage Docker cache
COPY package.json pnpm-workspace.yaml pnpm-lock.yaml ./

# Install dependencies for the monorepo using frozen lockfile
RUN pnpm install --frozen-lockfile

# Copy the rest of the repository
COPY . .

# Build the styled-components package from the workspace
RUN pnpm --filter styled-components build

# Default to an interactive shell; the built artifacts live under packages/styled-components
CMD ["/bin/bash"]
"}

{"path": ".dockerignore", "content": "# Exclude local development files from the docker context
.git
node_modules
**/node_modules
dist
build
coverage
.env
*.log
.vscode
.idea
tmp
*.tmp
.cache
.DS_Store
"}

VerifyBuild status: build_failed
Concerns: No multi-stage build: final image will include build tools (git, build-essential, Python) which increases image size; consider multi-stage to keep only runtime artifacts., CMD relies on /bin/bash: ensure node:slim actually includes /bin/bash in this variant; if not, the container may fail to start with /bin/bash., Node/pnpm compatibility: ensure the base image's Node version is compatible with pnpm v10 and the styled-components build script; mismatches could cause install/build failures.
Build error:
- Failing step/command:
  - RUN pnpm --filter styled-components build (Dockerfile:8/8)
- Exact error message and exit code:
  - exit code: 1
  - sh: 1: rimraf: not found
  -  ERR_PNPM_RECURSIVE_RUN_FIRST_FAIL  styled-components@6.3.11 prebuild: `rimraf dist && pnpm run generateErrors && pnpm run typecheck`
  - spawn ENOENT
  -  WARN   Local package.json exists, but node_modules missing, did you mean to install?
- Missing packages/files mentioned:
  - rimraf (not found)
  - node_modules (missing)
- Context / failing details:
  - Prebuild for styled-components 6.3.11 runs rimraf dist && pnpm run generateErrors && pnpm run typecheck; rimraf is not available in PATH, causing ENOENT and failure.
- Version/mismatch notes:
  - Base image uses node:slim
  - pnpm was installed globally as pnpm@10 earlier in the build
  - No explicit version mismatch shown; the issue appears to be missing dependencies (rimraf and node_modules) rather than a version conflict
- Likely root cause:
  - node_modules was removed or not persisted when copying source files (COPY . . overwrote prior install), so pnpm cannot find dependencies to run the build script. Running install after copying or avoiding overwriting node_modules should resolve.

steps.tool_input:
{"path": "Dockerfile", "content": "# Build container for styled-components project using pnpm workspace
FROM node:slim

# Install required system tools for building native addons and git access
ENV DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive
RUN apt-get update \
  && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends \
    git \
    ca-certificates \
    build-essential \
    python3 \
  && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

# Install a compatible version of pnpm (v10 as per blueprint)
RUN npm i -g pnpm@10
# Also ensure rimraf is available for build scripts
RUN npm i -g rimraf

WORKDIR /workspace

# Copy manifest files first to leverage Docker cache
COPY package.json pnpm-workspace.yaml pnpm-lock.yaml ./

# Install dependencies for the monorepo using frozen lockfile
RUN pnpm install --frozen-lockfile

# Copy the rest of the repository
COPY . .

# Build the styled-components package from the workspace
RUN pnpm --filter styled-components build

# Default to an interactive shell; the built artifacts live under packages/styled-components
CMD ["/bin/bash"]
"}

{"path": "Dockerfile", "content": "# Build container for styled-components project using pnpm workspace
FROM node:slim

# Install required system tools for building native addons and git access
ENV DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive
RUN apt-get update \
  && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends \
    git \
    ca-certificates \
    build-essential \
    python3 \
  && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

# Install a compatible version of pnpm (v10 as per blueprint)
RUN npm i -g pnpm@10
# Also ensure rimraf and typescript are available for build scripts
RUN npm i -g rimraf typescript

WORKDIR /workspace

# Copy manifest files first to leverage Docker cache
COPY package.json pnpm-workspace.yaml pnpm-lock.yaml ./

# Install dependencies for the monorepo using frozen lockfile
RUN pnpm install --frozen-lockfile

# Copy the rest of the repository
COPY . .

# Build the styled-components package from the workspace
RUN pnpm --filter styled-components build

# Default to an interactive shell; the built artifacts live under packages/styled-components
CMD ["/bin/bash"]
"}

steps.tool_input:
{"path": "Dockerfile", "content": "# Build container for styled-components project using pnpm workspace
FROM node:slim

# Install required system tools for building native addons and git access
ENV DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive
RUN apt-get update \
  && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends \
    git \
    ca-certificates \
    build-essential \
    python3 \
  && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

# Install a compatible version of pnpm (v10 as per blueprint)
RUN npm i -g pnpm@10
# Also ensure rimraf and typescript are available for build scripts
RUN npm i -g rimraf typescript
# Install common TypeScript type declarations to satisfy TS checks during build
RUN npm i -g @types/node @types/react @types/react-dom @types/stylis

WORKDIR /workspace

# Copy manifest files first to leverage Docker cache
COPY package.json pnpm-workspace.yaml pnpm-lock.yaml ./

# Install dependencies for the monorepo using frozen lockfile
RUN pnpm install --frozen-lockfile

# Copy the rest of the repository
COPY . .

# Build the styled-components package from the workspace
RUN pnpm --filter styled-components build

# Default to an interactive shell; the built artifacts live under packages/styled-components
CMD ["/bin/bash"]
"}

Root cause (preserved exact error messages)

- "src/utils/stylis.ts(1,25): error TS2307: Cannot find module 'stylis' or its corresponding type declarations."
- "src/constants.ts(4,19): error TS2307: Cannot find module 'react' or its corresponding type declarations."

What’s missing (as indicated by the errors)
- Node typings / DOM typings likely not present in the environment:
  - Cannot find name 'process', 'window', 'document'
  - Cannot find type declarations for React and React DOM Server
- Modules lacking type declarations mentioned in errors:
  - react
  - react-dom/server
  - postcss
  - stylis
  - csstype
  - @emotion/is-prop-valid
  - react-native
- Also implies missing DOM lib support (due to missing window/document) and NodeJS types

Version/mismatch context
- The failing package is styled-components@6.3.11 (build triggered via pnpm filter)
- npm notice appeared earlier: "New patch version of npm available! 11.11.0 -> 11.11.1" (non-fatal, just a version suggestion)

Summary
The Docker build fails at the final step when building styled-components (version 6.3.11) because the TypeScript compilation cannot find essential typings and modules (React typings, Node typings, postcss, stylis, etc.). This points to a misconfigured TypeScript/Node environment in the image (missing type declarations and DOM/Node libs), not a code issue in styled-components itself.

steps.tool_input:
{"path": "Dockerfile", "content": "# Build container for styled-components project using pnpm workspace
FROM node:slim

# Install required system tools for building native addons and git access
ENV DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive
RUN apt-get update \
  && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends \
    git \
    ca-certificates \
    build-essential \
    python3 \
    bash \
  && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

# Install a compatible version of pnpm (v10 as per blueprint)
RUN npm i -g pnpm@10

WORKDIR /workspace

# Copy manifest files first to leverage Docker cache
COPY package.json pnpm-workspace.yaml pnpm-lock.yaml ./

# Install dependencies for the monorepo using frozen lockfile
RUN pnpm install --frozen-lockfile

# Ensure common TypeScript typings are available for build
RUN pnpm add -D @types/node @types/react @types/react-dom @types/postcss || true

# Copy the rest of the repository
COPY . .

# Build the styled-components package from the workspace
RUN pnpm --filter styled-components build

# Default to an interactive shell; the built artifacts live under packages/styled-components
CMD ["/bin/bash"]
"}

steps.tool_input:
{"path": "Dockerfile", "content": "# Build container for styled-components project using pnpm workspace
FROM node:slim

# Install required system tools for building native addons and git access
ENV DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive
RUN apt-get update \
  && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends \
    git \
    ca-certificates \
    build-essential \
    python3 \
  && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

# Install a compatible version of pnpm (v10 as per blueprint)
RUN npm i -g pnpm@10

# Global build tooling to satisfy prebuild scripts
RUN npm i -g rimraf typescript

WORKDIR /workspace

# Copy manifest files first to leverage Docker cache
COPY package.json pnpm-workspace.yaml pnpm-lock.yaml ./

# Install dependencies for the monorepo using frozen lockfile
RUN pnpm install --frozen-lockfile

# Copy the rest of the repository
COPY . .

# Build the styled-components package from the workspace
RUN pnpm --filter styled-components build

# Default to an interactive shell; the built artifacts live under packages/styled-components
CMD ["/bin/bash"]
"}

steps.tool_input:
{"path": "Dockerfile", "content": "# Build container for styled-components project using pnpm workspace
FROM node:slim

# Install required system tools for building native addons and git access
ENV DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive
RUN apt-get update \
  && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends \
    git \
    ca-certificates \
    build-essential \
    python3 \
  && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

# Install a compatible version of pnpm (v10 as per blueprint)
RUN npm i -g pnpm@10

WORKDIR /workspace

# Copy manifest files first to leverage Docker cache
COPY package.json pnpm-workspace.yaml pnpm-lock.yaml ./

# Install dependencies for the monorepo (allow workspace edits to lockfile)
RUN pnpm install

# Ensure React/DOM typings and other common devDeps are present in the root workspace
RUN pnpm add -w react react-dom @types/react @types/react-dom @types/node postcss stylis csstype --ignore-workspace

# Copy the rest of the repository
COPY . .

# Build the styled-components package from the workspace
RUN pnpm --filter styled-components build

# Default to an interactive shell; the built artifacts live under packages/styled-components
CMD ["/bin/bash"]
"}

steps.tool_input:
{"path": "Dockerfile", "content": "# Build container for styled-components project using pnpm workspace
FROM node:18-slim

# Install required system tools for building native addons and git access
ENV DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive
RUN apt-get update \
  && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends \
    git \
    ca-certificates \
    build-essential \
    python3 \
  && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

# Use pnpm v10 as per blueprint
RUN corepack enable && corepack prepare pnpm@10.0.0-rc.0 --activate

WORKDIR /workspace

# Copy manifest files first to leverage Docker cache
COPY package.json pnpm-workspace.yaml pnpm-lock.yaml ./

# Install dependencies for the monorepo using frozen lockfile
RUN pnpm install --frozen-lockfile

# Copy the rest of the repository
COPY . .

# Build the styled-components package from the workspace
RUN pnpm --filter styled-components build

# Default to an interactive shell; the built artifacts live under packages/styled-components
CMD ["/bin/bash"]
"}

iterations.injected_lessons:
1. **TypeScript not found (`tsc: not found`)**  
   - **What happened:** The build failed early (`RUN pnpm --filter styled-components build`) because the `tsc` command was missing.  
   - **Likely cause:** `typescript` was not installed globally or within the workspace build environment.  
   - **Fix:** During the build stage, ensure `typescript` is available—either install it globally (`pnpm add -g typescript`) or ensure local workspace dependencies include it before running the build.

2. **`rimraf: not found` during `pnpm --filter styled-components build`**  
   - **What happened:** The final reported failure (`sh: 1: rimraf: not found`) indicates the `build` script in `styled-components` invokes `rimraf`, which isn’t installed in the build container.  
   - **Fix:** Confirm that `rimraf` is listed as a devDependency for the `styled-components` package or install it globally for the build phase (`pnpm add -g rimraf`) before invoking the build command.

3. **Build context and workspace path assumptions**  
   - **What happened:** Multiple steps mention uncertainty about workspace path (`/workspace/packages/styled-components`, `/packages/styled-components`, etc.).  
   - **Fix:** Explicitly `WORKDIR` to the root of the pnpm workspace and verify the correct relative path to `styled-components`. Use `pnpm -r build` to build all packages or specify the correct name from `pnpm-workspace.yaml`.

4. **Missing multi-stage architecture**  
   - **What happened:** The first build was large because it used a single image (`node:slim`) for both build and runtime.  
   - **Fix:** Use a **multi-stage build**:  
     - Stage 1 (“builder”): install devDependencies, build with `pnpm`.  
     - Stage 2 (“runtime”): copy only built artifacts and production dependencies.

5. **No explicit dependency install before build**  
   - **What happened:** The build command ran without ensuring dependencies were installed in the build context.  
   - **Fix:** Before running any build commands, include `RUN pnpm install --frozen-lockfile` (or `pnpm install --workspace-root`) to populate `node_modules` properly.

6. **Security and runtime concerns**  
   - **What happened:** The container ran as `root` and defaulted to an interactive shell rather than executing the app.  
   - **Fix:** Add a non-root user in the final stage and specify a clear `CMD ["node","./dist/index.js"]` or equivalent to start the app.

7. **Node base image version**  
   - **Observation:** The last change switched to `node:18-slim`. Node 18 is fine, but confirm compatibility with `pnpm` and any native addons.  
   - **Fix:** Stick with `node:18-slim` (LTS), but ensure it has the tools (`git`, `build-essential`, `python3`) only in the builder stage.

steps.tool_input:
{"path": "Dockerfile", "content": "# syntax=docker/dockerfile:1

FROM node:18-slim AS builder

# Install system dependencies (git for any VCS deps, build tools for native addons)
RUN apt-get update \
  && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends \
    git \
    build-essential \
    python3 \
  && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

# Install pnpm (v10 per repo's lockfile / blueprint)
RUN npm i -g pnpm@10.0.0

WORKDIR /workspace

# Copy source code
COPY . .

# Install dependencies (respect lockfile) and build the styled-components package
RUN pnpm install --frozen-lockfile
RUN pnpm --filter styled-components build
RUN pnpm --filter styled-components postbuild


FROM node:18-slim AS runtime

# Create a non-root user for runtime
RUN groupadd -r app && useradd -m -r -u 1001 -g app app

WORKDIR /workspace

# Copy the built package from the builder stage
COPY --from=builder /workspace/packages/styled-components /workspace/packages/styled-components

# Ensure correct ownership for non-root user
RUN chown -R app:app /workspace/packages/styled-components

USER app

# Provide a simple, informative entrypoint. This container is intended to expose the built package artifacts.
CMD ["node","-e","console.log('styled-components container ready. built artifacts located at /workspace/packages/styled-components')"]
"}

{"path": "Dockerfile", "content": "# syntax=docker/dockerfile:1

FROM node:18-slim AS builder

# Install system dependencies (git for any VCS deps, build tools for native addons)
RUN apt-get update \
  && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends \
    git \
    build-essential \
    python3 \
  && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

# Install pnpm (v10 per repo's lockfile / blueprint)
RUN npm i -g pnpm@10.0.0

WORKDIR /workspace

# Copy source code
COPY . .

# Install dependencies (respect lockfile) and build the styled-components package
RUN pnpm install --frozen-lockfile
RUN pnpm --filter styled-components build
RUN pnpm --filter styled-components postbuild


FROM node:18-slim AS runtime

# Create a non-root user for runtime
RUN groupadd -r app && useradd -m -r -u 1001 -g app app

WORKDIR /workspace

# Copy the built package from the builder stage
COPY --from=builder /workspace/packages/styled-components /workspace/packages/styled-components

# Ensure correct ownership for non-root user
RUN chown -R app:app /workspace/packages/styled-components

USER app

# Simple entrypoint to verify container works and where artifacts live
# Avoid complex quoting issues in CMD by using a simple echo command
CMD ["bash", "-lc", "echo 'styled-components build is ready. artifacts located at /workspace/packages/styled-components'"]
"}

# syntax=docker/dockerfile:1

FROM node:18-slim AS builder

# Install system dependencies (git for any VCS deps, build tools for native addons)
RUN apt-get update \
  && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends \
    git \
    build-essential \
    python3 \
  && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

# Install pnpm (v10 per repo's lockfile / blueprint)
RUN npm i -g pnpm@10.0.0

WORKDIR /workspace

# Copy source code
COPY . .

# Install dependencies (respect lockfile) and build the styled-components package
RUN pnpm install --frozen-lockfile
RUN pnpm --filter styled-components build
RUN pnpm --filter styled-components postbuild


FROM node:18-slim AS runtime

# Create a non-root user for runtime
RUN groupadd -r app && useradd -m -r -u 1001 -g app app

WORKDIR /workspace

# Copy the built package from the builder stage
COPY --from=builder /workspace/packages/styled-components /workspace/packages/styled-components

# Ensure correct ownership for non-root user
RUN chown -R app:app /workspace/packages/styled-components

USER app

# Simple entrypoint to verify container works and where artifacts live
# Avoid complex quoting issues in CMD by using a simple echo command
CMD ["bash", "-lc", "echo 'styled-components build is ready. artifacts located at /workspace/packages/styled-components'"]
